class.name: GDKErrorReporting
class.brief_description: Error-reporting configuration service accessed via GDK.error_reporting.
class.description: Wraps the public PC GDK [code]XError[/code] surface exposed by [code]XErrorSetCallback[/code] and [code]XErrorSetOptions[/code]. This service does not submit reports to external endpoints; it only configures runtime error-callback behavior and option flags. If your game attaches custom metadata to errors in downstream telemetry, you own privacy/compliance review for that metadata.

method.name: configure_options
method.description: Configures [code]XError[/code] options for debugger-present and debugger-absent execution modes using [enum ErrorOptions] flags. Combine flags with bitwise OR to set multiple behaviors.

method.name: set_callback_enabled
method.description: Registers or unregisters the [code]XError[/code] callback bridge. When enabled, callback events are surfaced as [signal error_reported] and mirrored into [signal GDK.runtime_error].

method.name: is_callback_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when [code]XError[/code] callback forwarding is currently enabled.

signal.name: error_reported
signal.description: Emitted on the main thread when the configured [code]XError[/code] callback reports an error.

constants.constant: Request OutputDebugString behavior when an error occurs.
Request debug break behavior when an error occurs.
Request fail-fast behavior when an error occurs.
